description: A game master's validation of a player's RPG data for a specific system. One record per player per system per GM.

main.description: A master record validating one player's stats for one system. Multiple GMs can validate the same player.

player.description: DID of the player this record validates

campaign.description: Name of the campaign this validation relates to

snapshotScope.description: What portions of stats are validated. 'none' = inherent trust (always valid), 'custom' = selected fields only, 'full' = all fields must match. Defaults to 'full' if omitted.

stats.description: Snapshot of the player's stats for this system. Omitted when snapshotScope is 'none'.

spriteCid.description: CID of the approved sprite blob (optional)

updatedAt.description: When this record was last modified
